query:
SELECT 'aluno' AS tabela, a.id, a.name, a.email, a.isActive, a.programId, a.consultorId, a.turmaId
FROM alunos a WHERE a.name LIKE '%Alexandre%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'consultor' AS tabela, c.id, c.name, c.email, c.isActive, c.programId, NULL, NULL
FROM consultors c WHERE c.name LIKE '%Alexandre%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'user' AS tabela, u.id, u.name, u.email, u.isActive, u.programId, u.consultorId, u.alunoId
FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%Alexandre%';
